ILLUSIONIST.title: Illusionist
ILLUSIONIST.description: A trickster of mirrors and illusions. Copy summons mirror images that replay your first card each turn and shatter when you take unblocked damage; read and reflect enemy intent; and transmute your own cards on the fly.
ILLUSIONIST.cardsModifierDescription: Adds the Illusionist's cards to the pool.
ILLUSIONIST.eventDeathPrevention: The Illusionist slips behind a mirror and refuses to fade.
